triggers.long_description: Execute another workflow from this workflow
triggers.label: Shuffle_Workflow_1
triggers.name: Shuffle Workflow

name: Ops Dashboard Workflow
description:
Sample workflow to show how to use different parts of the Shuffle Tools app. Built into sections, and used to make sure the app works at different stages.

Based on Shuffle Tools version >=1.2.0
